case_id: Eli Lambert (employee from Odoo demo data)

pi_items.source: Task description line 2: 'Create a new accrual plan named exactly "Monthly PTO Accrual"'

Odoo 17 official demo data. setup_data.py lines 6-8 confirm Eli Lambert is in official Odoo demo employee list. setup_odoo.sh lines 46-61 confirm demo data loading from Odoo's official HR module (hr, hr_holidays).
Industry standard PTO accrual rate: 20 annual days ÷ 12 months = 1.667 days/month. Verified via multiple HR sources (Oyster HR, BuddiesHR, Paycom). Task description line 3: 'Accrue 1.67 days'.
Annual PTO cap matching 12 months × 1.67 days/month ≈ 20 days. Task description line 3: 'Cap accrued time: Yes, maximum 20 days'.
Task description line 3: 'Frequency: Monthly'. Odoo 17 accrual plan rules support monthly frequency per documentation (Cybrosys Odoo 18 guide confirms monthly is standard frequency option).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Odoo 17 demo data, not synthetic data. The employee 'Eli Lambert' is part of Odoo's official HR demo dataset (20 employees included in standard Odoo 17 installation). The accrual plan metadata values are industry-standard: 1.67 days/month represents 20 days of annual PTO (20÷12≈1.67), and the cap of 20 days matches the annual total. All metadata claims align with standard HR accrual practices and Odoo 17 configurations.
